project_area: Business development, equipment purchase, infrastructure improvement, marketing, and operational expansion
demographic_requirements: No specific demographic requirements, but over 50% of awardees have been woman, minority, or veteran-owned small businesses
eligibility_summary: Businesses must be less than seven years old, have 15 or fewer full-time employees, and have less than $700,000 in assets. Applicants must demonstrate readiness to compete and a commitment to growth. A 3:1 match formula requires applicants to contribute $1 for every $3 provided by the state.
